zh.lifeSummary: 當Anthonye Dickensonne於1345年出生在英國越可爾赫爾時，他的父親Hugh Dykensonne25歲，母親Judith Robinson25歲。他於1376年與Catherine de la Pole在英國英格蘭越可爾赫爾結婚。他們至少是1個兒子的父母。他去世於1396年在英國英格蘭越可爾 易亞斯特 利丁享年51歲。

nameMeanings.name: Anthonye
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: The usual English form of the old Roman family name Antonius, which is of uncertain (probably Etruscan) origin. The spelling with -th- (not normally reflected in the pronunciation) represents a learned but erroneous attempt to associate it with Greek anthos ‘flower’. In the post-classical period it was a common name, borne by various early saints, most notably a 3rd-century Egyptian hermit monk, who is regarded as the founder of Christian monasticism.

historicEvents.title: Wycliffe's Bible
historicEvents.description: John Wycliffe, English theologian and professor at the University of Oxford, completed a translation of the Bible from the Latin Vulgate into Middle English. This translation is known as Wycliffe's Bible and was completed around 1382.

en.lifeSummary: When Anthonye Dickensonne was born in 1345, in Hull, Yorkshire, England, his father, Hugh Dykensonne, was 25 and his mother, Judith Robinson, was 25. He married Catherine de la Pole in 1376, in Hull, Yorkshire, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 1 son. He died in 1396, in Yorkshire East Riding, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 51.

Il a épousé Catherine de la Pole en 1376, à Hull, Everwyck, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils. ko.Kingston Upon Hull, Yorkshire, England: 영국 잉글랜드 요르크실르 킨그스턴 업 훌
ko.lifeSummary: Anthonye Dickensonne(이)가 1345년 영국 요르크실르 훌에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Hugh Dykensonne(은)는 25세였고, 그의 어머니 Judith Robinson(은)는 25세였다. 그는 1376년 영국 잉글랜드 요르크실르 훌에서 Catherine de la Pole(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들을 두었다. 그는 1396년 영국 잉글랜드 요르크실르 이스트 리딩에서 51세의 나이로 사망했다.

ru.Kingston Upon Hull, Yorkshire, England: кингстон упон хулл, еркшир, Англия, Великобритания
ru.lifeSummary: Когда Anthonye Dickensonne родился в 1345 г. в местности хулл, еркшир, Англия, его отцу по имени Hugh Dykensonne было 25 лет, а матери, которую звали Judith Robinson, 25. Он женился на женщине по имени Catherine de la Pole в 1376 г. в местности хулл, еркшир, Англия, Великобритания. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын. Он умер в 1396 г. в местности еркшир эаст ридинг, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 51 год.
